final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original sports illustration in hot-blooded shonen anime style of a basketball player executing a powerful slam dunk mid-air.

Style/medium: shonen sports anime illustration, bold ink outlines, dynamic action lines (speed lines), high-contrast cel shading in the spirit of Slam Dunk / Kuroko's Basketball
Composition: low-angle upward shot, player centered and towering against the sky, rim and net in foreground, crowd blurred in background, wide aspect feel with tight vertical drama
Subject: male basketball player at peak hang time, arm fully extended driving ball into hoop, jersey rippling, sweat droplets scattering in arcs around the body, intense determined expression
Scene/backdrop: indoor basketball arena, packed cheering crowd in the stands, multiple camera flash bursts lighting the background
Lighting/mood: dramatic stage lighting from above mixed with scattered camera flashes, high-energy and electrifying atmosphere, full of tension and passion
Color palette: vivid saturated primaries anchored by the player's jersey color, bright white flash highlights as accent, deep shadow zones for contrast
Materials/textures: cel-shaded flat color fills with sharp shadow edges, motion blur streaks on limbs and ball, sweat droplets rendered as flying liquid beads
Avoid: realistic photographic rendering, muted desaturated palette, static pose, generic clip-art style, watermark
